name: @bpmiq/github-app
description: GitHub App server-side primitives shared by the control plane (holds the app key, ADR 0002) and a standalone live-host: the RS256 app JWT, private-key loading, and the REST/OAuth plumbing (app requests, token minting, pagination, user OAuth), pinned in one place so the two sides can't drift. Zero third-party deps (node:crypto + node:fs).
